sections.title: Raking the patches before starting the quest

lines.speaker: Queen Ellamaria
lines.text: Hey - what are you doing with that patch, peasant?!? One demands that you speak to one's self immediately!!

sections.title: Attempting to climb the trellis before the quest

lines.speaker: Queen Ellamaria
lines.text: I shall not allow you to climb my trellis, peasant. Only providing your assistance to my project might cause me to reconsider.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I use this garden for my own farming?

lines.speaker: Queen Ellamaria
lines.text: What, you want to dig up the plants that took one so long to grow? Don't be ridiculous, you silly little fool.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: All right then, sorry I asked.

lines.speaker: Queen Ellamaria
lines.text: Impertinent peasant! Oh, if you promise to leave one alone then feel free to pick fruit from the White Tree. One is told that they are a great natural energy restorative.
